result.stdout:
Usage: [command] [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Generates class diagram from C# source code.

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    target C# file or directory

Options:
  -o|--output <string?>                      output file name (Default: null)
  -n|--name <string?>                        diagram name (Default: null)
  --additional-text <string?>                additional text to be inserted (Default: null)
  --additional-files <string[]?>             paths of files containing additional text to be inserted (Default: null)
  --minimum-accessibility <Accessibility>    minimum accessibility displayed in UML (Default: Internal)
  --hide-fields                              hide fields (Optional)
  --hide-properties                          hide properties (Optional)
  --hide-methods                             hide methods (Optional)
  --hide-members                             hide members (alias for --hide-fields --hide-properties --hide-methods) (Optional)
  --hide-enums                               hide enum types (Optional)
  --hide-implementations                     hide inheritance relationships (Optional)
  --hide-namespace                           hide namespace (Optional)
  --show-dependencies                        show dependencies between classes (Optional)
  --show-compositions                        show composition relationships (Optional)
  --exclude-namespaces <string[]?>           a list of namespaces to exclude (Default: null)
  --exclude-types <string[]?>                a list of types to exclude (Default: null)
  --special-types <string[]?>                 (Default: null)

Commands:
  asmdef    Generate Unity Assembly Definition (.asmdef) dependency graph
  csproj    Generate .csproj dependency graph

commands.payload:
Usage: [command] [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Generates class diagram from C# source code.

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    target C# file or directory

Options:
  -o|--output <string?>                      output file name (Default: null)
  -n|--name <string?>                        diagram name (Default: null)
  --additional-text <string?>                additional text to be inserted (Default: null)
  --additional-files <string[]?>             paths of files containing additional text to be inserted (Default: null)
  --minimum-accessibility <Accessibility>    minimum accessibility displayed in UML (Default: Internal)
  --hide-fields                              hide fields (Optional)
  --hide-properties                          hide properties (Optional)
  --hide-methods                             hide methods (Optional)
  --hide-members                             hide members (alias for --hide-fields --hide-properties --hide-methods) (Optional)
  --hide-enums                               hide enum types (Optional)
  --hide-implementations                     hide inheritance relationships (Optional)
  --hide-namespace                           hide namespace (Optional)
  --show-dependencies                        show dependencies between classes (Optional)
  --show-compositions                        show composition relationships (Optional)
  --exclude-namespaces <string[]?>           a list of namespaces to exclude (Default: null)
  --exclude-types <string[]?>                a list of types to exclude (Default: null)
  --special-types <string[]?>                 (Default: null)

Commands:
  asmdef    Generate Unity Assembly Definition (.asmdef) dependency graph
  csproj    Generate .csproj dependency graph

result.stdout:
Usage: asmdef [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Generate Unity Assembly Definition (.asmdef) dependency graph

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    target directory

Options:
  -o|--output <string?>             output file path (Default: null)
  -n|--name <string?>               Diagram name (Default: null)
  --additional-text <string?>       The additional text to be inserted (Default: null)
  --additional-files <string[]?>    Paths of files containing additional text to be inserted (Default: null)
  --size <int>                      graph size (Default: 2)
